programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is duped into signing up for the Army, and his hijinks after basic training ultimately results in a military occupation of Springfield.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Howard and Bernadette decide they want to be married before his NASA space launch, the gang rushes to put on a wedding.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard discovers that he can't escape his mother - even in space! Caught in an argument between Bernadette and his mom, Howard deals with woman trouble from the space station.

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.sub-title: Sometimese It's Good To Be Cautious
programme.desc: Bruce and Alex give conflicting medical advice to a young athlete; Joyce competes with Tiger Woods in her alumni magazine; Matt and Serena (almost) drop an unconscious patient.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Justin jumps the gun. Jo has second thoughts. Mackenzie gets the wrong guy.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry is a confirmed ladies' man, but when he meets Lucy in a local café, it's love at first sight. So how come she can't remember him the next day? Starring Drew Barrymore and Adam Sandler..

programme.title: Australian Survivor: Redemption
programme.desc: The final three compete in their biggest Individual Immunity Challenge. Who will fall one day short and be voted off to join the jury and determine which player will claim the title of Sole Survivor.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The case of two high school students, one dead and one missing, lead the CSIs into the underbelly of streetcar racing and a tangled web of deadly competition.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max orchestrates a plan to get Dr. Fuentes terminated from New Amsterdam once and for all.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: A calendar mix-up finds Deborah double-booked - just as an unfortunate supercut of her most problematic early jokes starts circulating.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: We’re halfway through the farmers quest for love. And after a big weekend of camping, the farmers choose who to take on their next solo date.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 5am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri is having an ordinary kind of day and she doesn’t feel like doing much. But Pania’s extraordinary farts make the day amazing!

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: The jungle can be a dangerous place... but thankfully there are a group of heroes ready to defend those in trouble. Join the Jungle Bunch as they rush to the rescue of their animal friends!

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Justin jumps the gun. Jo has second thoughts. Mackenzie gets the wrong guy.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides Australia
programme.desc: Our Aussie mates visited Wanaka! Will their high expectations be met?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa helps Moe get a poem published, but is deeply hurt when Moe refuses to acknowledge her contribution.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that Penny is thinking about breaking up with Leonard, he tries to intervene.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sam and Jay work to secure Woodstone B&B a coveted spot on a prestigious luxury hotel list, only to face unexpected chaos when a vengeful newly discovered bunker ghost disrupts a crucial visit.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Brax gets into a brawl. Mackenzie pursues her lead. Abigial and Lacey are united.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actor Phil Dunster, star of stage and screen Cush Jumbo and comedian Josh Widdicombe.

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: As Les makes great strides in the lab and RPW stumbles on the path to romance, both are struck with fear for Lindy’s wellbeing as she discovers her bloodlust.

programme.title: Australian Survivor: Redemption
programme.desc: Season Finale: The final two deliver their pitch to the jury before the votes are cast. One player will claim the title of Sole Survivor and take home $500,000.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs visit Stonington, Connecticut, to compete in a very fishy relay race; during dinner service, both teams step up their game but will it be enough to keep them in the competition?

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Courteney is trying to bring spirit to Heådltston, but it’s impossible. When her team heads to SDSJC for their homecoming game, Courteney is reminded of how much spirit her old school has.

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: The Gladiators are back, tougher than ever. Hosts Bradley and Barney Walsh reveal the return of the iconic event Atlaspheres as the gritty Contenders battle for a spot in the quarter-finals.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: On the third night of the auditions, artists from all over Australia hope to turn chairs. A youth worker and a TikTok influencer must prove they have what it takes to get ahead in the competition.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 6am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: The entire Sheffield clan, including C.C. and Fran, spends the weekend "vacationing" at Fran's parents' house when a blizzard closes the airports and maroons them in Queens.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody's triggered.

programme.title: Dress The Nation
programme.desc: Guest expert Lily Cole joins hosts Vernon Kay and AJ Odudu as the remaining amateur designers compete for a dream mentorship with high street giant M&S in the semi-final.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: At The Royal Melbourne Hospital, Dr James Williams fears for a young cheerleader who’s landed on her head in training. Dr Michael Dunne expects the worst when he unwraps the bandages from a man’s arm.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Bill's swinging arm growth prevents him from living his retirement dreams; Regina distracts from the many moles on her face with a vibrant style; budding med student Gili helps Dr. Lee.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actor Phil Dunster, star of stage and screen Cush Jumbo and comedian Josh Widdicombe.

programme.title: Netball: ANZ Premiership
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening match of Round 3 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Pulse host the Stars from TSB Arena in Wellington.
